reasoning: The Coalition of the Willing explicitly plans to deploy its reassurance force "once hostilities have ceased" (as reiterated in an October 24, 2025 Chairs’ statement). As of the October 26, 2025 knowledge cutoff, no ceasefire is in effect. With only just over two months remaining in the year, there is an extremely tight timeline for a ceasefire to be negotiated, signed, and fully implemented, and for a subsequent physical deployment of Coalition forces to Ukraine before December 31, 2025. While a rapid political settlement could hypothetically lead to late-2025 deployments of advance components, the likelihood of all these conditions being met so quickly is very low.
batch_queries: Will the European “Coalition of the Willing” deploy forces to Ukraine in 2025?
